why_this_action.summary: Codeberg adoption is still flat, generic directory submissions are already saturated, StackOverflow is in cooldown until 2026-05-24T11:24:37+02:00, and AI Coding Stack is a fresh unsent high-fit third-party coding-tools directory with an explicit contribution path and direct CLI discovery intent.

expected_outcome: A new third-party CLI/directory inclusion or maintainer reply that can send qualified evaluator traffic toward the Codeberg-first Ralph Workflow repo.

measurement_window.success_metric: Maintainer reply, listing inclusion, or attributable qualified repo inspection / Codeberg adoption movement.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If there is no reply or listing signal by the review checkpoint, stop reusing the same general email angle and switch to a different fresh demand-capture lane or a more concrete metadata/PR-format follow-up.
